chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-10 of 2018. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection. 02. For hearing of main case. 15.03.2022 Mr. Mazhar Ali Bhutto, Advocate for the petitioner. None for private respondents. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl.A.G Sindh. = * = * = * = * = * = The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has sought for departmental action against the private respondents being civil servants for their alleged involvement in political activities by supporting a local political person, which is denied by one of the private respondent by filing his comments. The rival claims involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in its writ jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
